A

Template Method base class for generating simple text reports.

Add notes to an appointment.

Add charges to a bill and recalculate amount.
address - Variable in class com.airtribe.meditrack.entity.Person
 
addTax(double) - Method in class com.airtribe.meditrack.util.AppConfig

Optional AI Helper utility class for advanced features.
analyzeHealthPatterns(String) - Static method in class com.airtribe.meditrack.util.AIHelper
Analyze patient health patterns.

Singleton pattern implementation for application configuration.

Appointment entity with cloning support (deep copy).

Concrete report that demonstrates the Template Method pattern.

Observer interface for appointment notifications.

Exception thrown when an appointment is not found.

Service class for managing appointments with Observer pattern integration.

Enum for appointment status values.

B

Bill - Class in com.airtribe.meditrack.entity
Bill entity with Strategy pattern implementation.
Bill(String, String, String, String, double) - Constructor for class com.airtribe.meditrack.entity.Bill
 
BillFactory - Class in com.airtribe.meditrack.util
Factory pattern implementation for creating different bill types with strategies.
BillFactory() - Constructor for class com.airtribe.meditrack.util.BillFactory
 
BillFactory.BillType - Enum Class in com.airtribe.meditrack.util
Bill type enumeration.
BillingStrategies - Class in com.airtribe.meditrack.util
Concrete billing strategies demonstrating Strategy design pattern.
BillingStrategies() - Constructor for class com.airtribe.meditrack.util.BillingStrategies
 
BillingStrategies.DiscountedBillingStrategy - Class in com.airtribe.meditrack.util
Discounted billing strategy - for bulk appointments.
BillingStrategies.EmergencyBillingStrategy - Class in com.airtribe.meditrack.util
Emergency billing strategy - higher charges for emergency appointments.
BillingStrategies.PremiumBillingStrategy - Class in com.airtribe.meditrack.util
Premium billing strategy - with service charge.
BillingStrategies.StandardBillingStrategy - Class in com.airtribe.meditrack.util
Standard billing strategy - consultation + lab + medicine + tax.
BillingStrategy - Interface in com.airtribe.meditrack.interfaces
Strategy interface for different billing strategies.
BILLS_DATA_FILE - Static variable in class com.airtribe.meditrack.constants.Constants
 
BILLS_FILE - Static variable in class com.airtribe.meditrack.constants.Constants

Service class for billing management with Strategy pattern implementation.
